mapper.select: SELECT job_key AS "jobKey", job_json AS "jobJson", favorited_at AS "favoritedAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM job_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT job_key AS "jobKey", job_json AS "jobJson", favorited_at AS "favoritedAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM job_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND job_key = #{jobKey}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_favorite( favorite_id, user_id, job_key, job_json, favorited_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{favoriteId}, #{userId}, #{jobKey}, #{jobJson}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, job_key) DO UPDATE SET job_json = EXCLUDED.job_json, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
